recommendations.description: A flaming wreck of a minecraft mod about nuclear technology that is somehow still in development.
recommendations.hot_issues_summary: Issue with Missiles and Rockets Getting Stuck Mid-Flight; The Decorationing; [Request]  Doors on redstone
recommendations.readme_snippet:
# HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod for Minecraft 1.7.10

[NTM on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm)

[NTM on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hbms-nuclear-tech-mod)

[Official NTM W
recommendations.recommendation: NTM：大型 Minecraft 核技術模組，適合擅長 mod 開發與遊戲機制除錯的貢獻者，修復飛彈/火箭卡住等問題回饋顯著。

recommendations.hot_issues_summary: [WIP] Add SSE Support; Configurable server port for the tests; Add method to get URLEncoded version of HttpRequest
recommendations.recommendation: Vert.x-Web：反應式 Web 組件集合，可從 SSE、測試 port 配置或 URL encode 等 enhancement 切入，適合熟悉 reactive/Vert.x 的開發者。

recommendations.hot_issues_summary: nzyme-tap is not monitoring on Raspberry Pi 4 and 5 - `libpcap error: That device is not up`; Make wifi interface monitoring handling optional; "Quick Actions" and more links for alerts
recommendations.recommendation: Nzyme：網路/無線偵測系統（2.0 開發中），適合資安與系統整合方向的工程師，Raspberry Pi 與監控相關問題為重要切入點。

recommendations.hot_issues_summary: Add Q2 switch to exit on failed deploy; Import Key with even parity fails with Parity Exception; Q2.deployElement doesn't write the destination file atomically, which can make the deploy polling to fail
recommendations.recommendation: jPOS：ISO-8583 支付交易工具，適合對支付系統或交易交換熟悉的貢獻者，可從部署原子性、Parity 與穩定性問題著手。

recommendations.description: The official Java SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with Spring AI
recommendations.hot_issues_summary: feat: implement support for SEP-1686 Tasks; feat: Add Pagination for server requests; Fix HttpClient resource leak in HTTP transports
recommendations.recommendation: MCP Java SDK：與 Spring AI 合作、功能與底層傳輸活躍，優先修復 HttpClient bug 或實作 SEP-1686 Tasks 可獲高度回饋。

recommendations.hot_issues_summary: bug: Missing YouTube Kids logo in sidebar menu and misaligned pip text in flyout menu; Latest version support for YT and YTM; feat: overly icon buttons
recommendations.readme_snippet: ## 🧩 ReVanced Extended Patches [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/RVX_Wiki-gray?logo=github)](https:/
recommendations.recommendation: ReVanced 補丁：社群活躍、相容性與功能需求明確，熟悉 Android/mod 補丁的貢獻者能快速上手。

recommendations.description: Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy   on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.
recommendations.hot_issues_summary: [Feature] 上传skill文件类型限制问题; [Bug] 上传报错; [Feature] 用户管理功能没有重置密码，用户个人也没有重置密码接口
recommendations.readme_snippet:
SkillHub

An enterprise-grade, open-source agent skill registry — publish, discover
recommendations.recommendation: SkillHub：企業級自託管技能倉庫、star 增速快，文件與上傳/使用者管理的改進價值高，適合後端/DevOps。

recommendations.description: Minecraft Fabric mod which allows you to join EVERY Minecraft server version (Classic, Alpha, Beta, Release, April Fools, Bedrock)
recommendations.hot_issues_summary: Lava and water blocks in c0.30 CPE (Feature Request); Fences updating wrong after breaking neighbor; full CTS (Combat Test 8c) support
recommendations.readme_snippet: ViaFabricPlus
recommendations.recommendation: ViaFabricPlus：處理 Minecraft 協議與版本相容性，協議/渲染 bug 修復能直接改善玩家體驗，適合 protocol 開發者。

recommendations.description: An Instagram Xposed module with features like Developer Options, Ghost Mode, Ad-Free browsing, and Distraction-Free Mode.
recommendations.hot_issues_summary: [feature request] download photos,videos, stories ; feat: Unsend msgs won't disappear from chat; [Problem] InstaEclipse settings menu is not opening
recommendations.readme_snippet: # InstaEclipse ⚡ Enhance Your Instagram Experience! Inst
recommendations.recommendation: InstaEclipse：LSPosed Instagram 增強模組，有明確功能請求與 good-first-issue，適合 Android/Xposed 開發者快速切入。

recommendations.description: 企業級 AI 能力市集，整合 Model API、MCP Server、Agent API 的發布與營運平台
recommendations.recommendation: 2025年8月才創建就已破千星，AI infra 方向極熱，MCP Server 整合是當前焦點。有 help wanted 標籤，社群友善，現在進去是早期貢獻者優勢。

recommendations.description: TestNG — JVM 平台最成熟的 Java 測試框架
recommendations.recommendation: 15年歷史，Java 社群知名度極高，287 個 open issue 貢獻空間大，對履歷加分明顯。

recommendations.description: 全非同步多執行緒 Minecraft 開源反作弊插件，支援 1.8-1.21
recommendations.recommendation: 有 good first issue，Bukkit/Paper 社群活躍，適合入門高並發 Java 開發，有 Discord 支援。

recommendations.description: 企業級開源網路監控平台，支援 SNMP、JMX、HTTP 等多種協議
recommendations.recommendation: 有 hacktoberfest 標籤對外部貢獻友善，open issue 數少（90），進入難度低，適合磨練大型 Java 系統經驗。

recommendations.description: 自動化資料庫模糊測試工具，已在 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQLite 等發現數百個 bug
recommendations.recommendation: ETH Zürich 學術背景，技術含金量高，有 good first issue，支援多種 DBMS，貢獻方向多元。
